ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., MBB, WBB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sport (e.g., team sports, individual sports) */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the sport (e.g., NCAA, FIFA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2010-11) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., active, completed, upcoming) */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Kansas, Ohio St.) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started their tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended their tenure (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the coach */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the season (if applicable) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the season (if applicable) */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored in the season (for sports like football) */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded in the season (for sports like football) */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within their conference */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National rank of the team */,
  "playoff_performance" TEXT /* Summary of the team's performance in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES team_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., Big 12, SEC) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)
